action.reasoning: Observation: 4-model ensemble achieved new best 0.8684. 4 iterations and ~2.27h remaining. Each training run takes ~230s (~4min). Eval takes ~45s. Analysis: I could train one more diverse model (e.g., different seed) and try a 5-model ensemble, but risk of regression exists. Safer: train one more model, save as a 5th slot (m4), then ensemble 5. But predict.py only loads m1/m2/m3. I'd need to update predict.py to also load m4. Let me train a new diverse model and add to ensemble. Decision: Train new model with seed=42, LA_TAU=1.0 (different from others) saving as m4.pt, update predict.py to include m4, submit eval.
action.command: SEED=42 LA_TAU=1.0 SAVE_NAME=m4.pt EPOCHS=18 python train3.py
